title: Tetracyclines
body_html:
Key Points
  • Tetracyclines are used in the management of a broad range of conditions - Chlamydia, Lyme disease, Brucella, Q-fever, Acne, Respiratory infections and more.
  • They can cause teeth staining and dental hypoplasia in developing children, therefore should be avoided in children under 12 years and breast feeding mothers.
  • Minocycline has the broadest spectrum of activity.
